name: German Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, beat the egg lightly and stir in flour until blended.
2. Stir in the potatoes (squeezed dry), onion, salt, and pepper.
3. Heat a 10-inch skillet over medium-high heat and melt the margarine and oil.
4. Spoon 2 tablespoons of the potato mixture into the skillet for each pancake.
5. Flatten each pancake with a spatula into a 3-inch round.
6. Fry each side for 2 to 3 minutes, or until crisp and golden brown.
7. Place the fried pancakes in a single layer on a baking sheet and keep warm in a preheated 200-degree oven while frying the remaining pancakes.
8. Serve with applesauce immediately.
